\subsection{Model Comparison}

\subsubsection{DynUNet Loss Ablation (MiniVess, 3-fold, 100 epochs)}

% From outputs/analysis/comparison_table.tex
\input{artifacts/tab-loss-ablation}

Key findings:
\begin{itemize}
  \item \textbf{cbdice\_cldice}: clDice = 0.906 $\pm$ 0.008 (best topology),
        DSC = 0.772 $\pm$ 0.016
  \item \textbf{dice\_ce}: DSC = 0.824 $\pm$ 0.014 (best voxel overlap),
        clDice = 0.832 $\pm$ 0.019
  \item \textbf{cbdice}: DSC = 0.767 $\pm$ 0.023, clDice = 0.799 $\pm$ 0.020
  \item \textbf{dice\_ce\_cldice}: DSC = 0.736 $\pm$ 0.016, clDice = 0.905 $\pm$ 0.003
  \item Topology gain of cbdice\_cldice over dice\_ce:
        $+8.9\%$ clDice, $-5.3\%$ DSC
  \item For vascular segmentation, connectivity (clDice) $>$ voxel overlap (DSC)
\end{itemize}
